  "findings": [
    "Backfill lifts exceed maximum allowable thickness for the compaction equipment used",
    "Inadequate compaction risk leading to future pipe settlement and structural failure"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop backfilling operations immediately",
    "Excavate the non-compliant backfill layers down to the approved bedding level",
    "Re-lay and compact the backfill in lifts matching project specifications (typically 6 to 8 inches maximum)"
  ],
  "rationale": "The observed backfill lifts are too thick for the compactor to achieve the required density. This violates standard project specifications and IPC 306 guidelines regarding proper pipe support and backfilling, creating a high risk of pipe deflection, joint separation, or surface settlement.",

    "IPC 306",
    "Project Specifications Section 312333 (Trenching and Backfilling)"
  ]
